user.title: ValueClouds Setup
user.description: Set up your ValueClouds integration to monitor your energy storage system. You'll need your device PN, SN, and devcode from the ValueClouds web interface (https://www.valueclouds.com) - open browser DevTools (F12) while viewing your device to capture these values.

data_description.pn: The PN value from your device (found in DevTools Network tab)
data_description.sn: The SN/serial number of your inverter
data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch data from ValueClouds. Default is5 seconds (real-time). For faster updates, use5-30 seconds.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to ValueClouds API. Please check your internet connection and device credentials.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Please verify your credentials.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This ValueClouds account is already configured.

init.title: ValueClouds Options
init.description: Configure advanced options for your ValueClouds integration.

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch data from ValueClouds (minimum 5 seconds)
